TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_Suming_Rupi, title = Suming_Rupi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/Suming_Rupi} }

S.FORM: Suming Rupi, 'inamiszukuan, pinualjak i 1978 a cavilj a sicigacu a tapuluq kata pitju a qadavan, a ngadan nua pairaing ti ŚßúŤĀĖśįĎ, mavananga a cacaquan a semanay kata śľĒŚď°. a amiszuku na donghe i taitu timadju, a kitjualanga a kemasi . masan tua cacaquan a semanay kata ŚźČšĽĖśČč nua ŚúĖť®įś®āŚúėkataŤČĺŚŹĮŤŹäśĖĮ, sa śľĒŚ•ŹÁõīÁ¨õ kata pa'urugang timadju uta. papaqayamen timadju a semananga ta liaw a senay sa sinansenay tua tjuruvu a cacaquan a semanay namadju. saka, macaqu a cempu, zemiya, zemuka timadju uta. sipakalevan ta kinasengseng na senay a "śąĎŚú®ťā£ťāäŚĒĪ" na sikamasansimuluq saka alu a ťáĎśõ≤ÁćéśúÄšĹ≥ś®āŚúė ka 2007 a cavilj timadju. sipakalevavan ta kinasengseng a "Ť∑≥ś†ľŚ≠ź" na Á¨¨45ŚĪÜ a ťáĎť¶¨ÁćéśúÄšĹ≥śĖįśľĒŚď°Áćé ka 2008 a cavilj timadju. sipakalevavan ta kinasengseng na senay a "SumingŤąíÁĪ≥śĀ©" na sikamasanitalj a ťáĎśõ≤ÁćéśúÄšĹ≥ś®āŚúė ka 2010 a cavilj timadju. semanuta timadju ta ťėŅÁĪ≥śĖĮťü≥ś®āÁĮÄ kata taqaljaqaljan nua Edoulan ka 2013 a cavilj. sipakalevavan ta kinasengseng a semenay a „ÄąšłćŤ¶ĀśĒĺś£Ą„ÄČnua iga a "Ś§™ťôĹÁöĄŚ≠©Ś≠ź"na Á¨¨52ŚĪÜ a ka 2015 a cavilj, sa inia madradraw timadju : "maqati a semenay aken, sa maqati a śľĒŚáļaken uta"ayain nimadju. pakalevavan tjiamadju aÁ¨¨27ŚĪÜ a uta ka 2016 a cavilj. pakalevavan tjiamadju a masnsivalj aÁłĹÁĶĪśĖáŚĆĖÁćé a ťĚíŚĻīŚČĶśĄŹÁćé ka 2017 a cavilj. tucu a masan a malailaing nua ŚŹįÁĀ£ŚÖ¨ŚÖĪťõĽŤ¶Ė timadju. kinasengseng na senay kinasengseng nuaŚúĖť®įś®āŚúė semananga a kinasengseng na senay a "śąĎŚú®ťā£ťāäŚĒĪ"ka 2006 a cavilj a sigacu semananga a kinasengseng na senay a "śąĎŚú®ťā£ťāäŚĒĪ"ka 2009 a cavilj a kugacu kinasengseng nuaŤČĺŚŹĮŤŹäśĖĮ semananga a senay a „ÄąÁúľÁĚõÁú®Áú®„ÄČkata„Äąť§äś®āŚ§ö„ÄČ sa kiruku i kinasengseng a "ÁĺéťļóŚŅÉśįĎŤ¨† śÉ≥ŚŅĶ"ka 2007 a cavilj a kugacu semananga a senay a „ÄąŚą©śĺ§Áį° Ś•ĹÁĺé„ÄČkata„ÄąťÉĹŤė≠ŚŹ§Ť™Ņ„ÄČ sa kiruku i kinasengseng a senay nua iga a "Á∑īÁŅíśõ≤"ka 2007 a cavilj a ziugacu kinasengseng na Suming naqemati a senay a kinasengseng nimadju semansenay ta kinasengseng a "Suming" ka 2010 a cavilj a gugucu a tapuluq kata lima a qadavan semansenay ta kinasengseng a"ťėŅÁĪ≥śĖĮAmis"ka 2012 a cavilj a lukugacu a tjelu a puluq a qadavan semansenay ta kinasengseng a"ÁĺéŚľŹÁĒüśīĽ"ka 2013 a cavilj a ziunigacu a drusa a puluq a qadavan semansenay ta kinasengseng a"śĶ∑śīč¬∑ś£ģśěó"ka 2014 a cavilj a hacigacu a tapuluq kata siva a qadavan semansenay ta kinasengseng a"Bondada"ka 2012 a cavilj a ziunigacu a tjelu a qadavan naqemati a kinasengseng a EP nimadju a senay a kinasengseng a"Suming" a senay a kinasengseng a"Suming2" semansenay ta kinasengseng a"Suming3"ka 2010 a cavilj semansenay ta kinasengseng a"ťĀ†śīč"ka 2010 a cavilj a ziunigacu a tapuluq kata alu a qadavan semansenay ta kinasengseng a"ÁĺéŚ•ĹÁöĄśó•Ś≠ź"ka 2013 a cavilj a sicigacu a lima a qadavan semansenay ta kinasengseng a"ŚźĎśúÄŚąĚÁöĄŤá™Ś∑ĪŤáīśē¨"ka 2017 a cavilj a sicigacu a pitju a qadavan semansenay ta kinasengseng a"ťĀ†śīč"ka 2018 a cavilj senay semansenay a"ťāĄŚ≥∂ŚŅęś®ā"ka 2017 a cavilj a ziunigacu a tjelu a puluq a qadavan (kiruku i kinasengseng a "śąĎšĺÜŤá™‚Ä¶" ni Śź≥śĪ∂Ťä≥) semansenay a"Á≥Ėśěú"ka 2018 a cavilj a nigacu a drusa a puluq kata lima a qadavan semansenay a"ťāĄŚ≥∂ŚŅęś®ā"ka 2017 a cavilj a ziunigacu a tjelu a puluq a qadavan naqemati a senay a kinasengseng katua zuma a senay a kinasengseng a"ťĀäšĺÜťĀäŚéĽ"ka 2000 a cavilj a kugacu, kiruku ta senay a „ÄąśĶ™šļļÁēęŚģ∂„ÄČ a senay a kinasengseng a"ÁĺéťļóŚŅÉśįĎŤ¨†"ka 2006 a cavilj a sigacu, kiruku ta senay a „ÄąŚ∑īŚ•ąŚćĀšĻĚ„ÄČ a senay a kinasengseng a"Open Taipei"ka 2010 a cavilj a kugacu, kiruku ta senay a „ÄąŚú®ťÄôŚüéŚłāŚĮęšłčśĄõ„ÄČ a senay a kinasengseng a"Open Taiwan"ka 2011 a cavilj a kugacu, kiruku ta senay a „ÄąŤ°∑ŚŅÉ„ÄČ a senay a kinasengseng a"ŚŹįÁĀ£Áĺéś®āŚúį"tua sinkinkiu a ŤĒ°ŤčĪśĖá ka 2015 a cavilj a kugacu, kiruku ta senay a „ÄąšļģťĽě„ÄČ(semanay kati ) a senay a kinasengseng a"Áą≤ŚćóŤŅīŤÄĆŚĒĪ" ka 2017 a cavilj a zingacu, kiruku ta senay a „ÄąÁ•ąťõ®ÁöĄŚ©¶šļļ„ÄČ naqemati a senay a senay a kinasengseng nua iga a"KANO" ka 2014 a cavilj a nigacu, kiruku ta senay a „ÄąŚčáŤÄÖÁöĄśĶ™śľę„ÄČ(semanay katišł≠Ś≠ĚšĽč, Rake, ŤĆÉťÄłŤá£, ÁĺÖÁĺéÁé≤) a senay a kinasengseng nua iga a"Ś§™ťôĹÁöĄŚ≠©Ś≠ź" ka 2015 a cavilj a zingacu, kiruku ta senay a „ÄąťÄôŚÄčśôāšĽ£„ÄČkata„ÄąšłćŤ¶ĀśĒĺś£Ą„ÄČ a senay a kinasengseng nua iga a"52 Hz I Love You" ka 2017 a cavilj a icigacu a senay a kinasengseng nua iga a"śľāśĶĀťĀáŤ¶čšĹ†" ka 2019 a cavilj a kugacu kinasengseng tua vinecikan nua kemudakuda a kinasengseng a "ŤąíÁĪ≥śĀ© 2010-2011 LiveśľĒŚĒĪśúÉ", ka 2011 a cavilj a ziuicigacu a drusa a puluq kata lima a qadavan a kinasengseng a "SumingŤąíÁĪ≥śĀ© AKA SIWALAAY KAKO HAW! ", ka 2017 a cavilj a sicigacu a pitju a qadavan kinasengseng tua śľĒŚáļ kinasengseng a iga tua cinalivatan a kinasengseng a"śĶ∑śīčÁÜĪ", ka 2004 a cavilj a kinasengseng a"ŚúĖť®įŤĹČŚĎÄŤĹČ", ka 2006 a cavilj a kinasengseng a"Ť™įŚú®ťā£ťāäŚĒĪ", ka 2009 a cavilj a kinasengseng a"śČõśóóŚ≠źÁöĄSuming", ka 2016 a cavilj a kinasengseng a"śľāśĶĀťĀáŤ¶čšĹ†", ka 2017 a cavilj aza a iga nua tilibi i kinasengseng a"Ť∑≥ś†ľŚ≠ź"ta masan ťėŅŚģó, ka 2007 a cavilj i kinasengseng a"śąĎŚú®ťÄôťāäŚĒĪ" ta masan Suming, ka 2009 a cavilj iga i kinasengseng a"Á∑īÁŅíśõ≤"ta masan caucau ta pa'urugang , ka 2007 a cavilj i kinasengseng a"ÁĒú¬∑Á•ēŚĮÜ"ta masan ťėŅŤĽä, ka 2012 a cavilj i kinasengseng a"52 Hz I Love You"ta masanśłłŚ§ßś≤≥, ka 2017 a cavilj tilibi a kinasengseng a"ťÄôŤ£°ÁôľÁŹĺśĄõ", ka 2008 a cavilj i kinasengseng a"Ś≥įŤŅīťĚíśė•Ť∑Į"ta masanťĽĎťĀďŚįŹŚľü ŚįŹšłČ, ka 2011 a cavilj i kinasengseng a"ÁĹ™Áĺéťļó"ta masan kinsac, ka 2012 a cavilj i kinasengseng a" II"ta masanśĹėšłĖśĚĪ, ka 2017 a cavilj i kinasengseng a"Á®ģŤŹúŚ•≥Á•ě"ta masanť¶¨ŤÄÄ, ka 2018 a cavilj sipakeljakeljang a vecik a kinasengseng a"šł≠ŤŹĮšłČŤŹĪťĚíśė•ťāĄťĄČ", ka 2015 a cavilj a kinasengseng ta remuing a senay a kinasengseng a"Ś§©šĹŅšĻüśúÉŚŹóŚā∑"nuaŚįŹÁĒ∑Ś≠©ś®āŚúė, ka 2016 a cavilj cinalivatan a pinakaleva pinakaleva tua semansenay pinakaleva tua semansenay uta pakalevavan a ‚Äďť¶ĖÁćéśĶ∑śīčŚ§ßŤ≥ě ka 2005 a cavilj pakalevavan a ťü≥ś®āťĆĄŚĹĪŚł∂ÁĶĄÁ¨¨šłÄŚźć(Kayoing) ka 2009 a cavilj pakalevavan a ka 2014 a cavilj pinakaleva tua iga pakalevavan a kataŤßÄÁúĺÁ•®ťĀłśúÄšĹ≥ŚĹĪÁČá‚ÄďÁīÄťĆĄÁČá ka 2004 a cavilj pakalevavan a ‚Äď ka 2008 a cavilj pakalevavan a ‚Äď "ÁĒú¬∑Á•ēŚĮÜ" ka 2013 a cavilj pakalevavan a ‚Äď "KANO" ka 2014 a cavilj pakalevavan a ‚Äď "Ś§™ťôĹÁöĄŚ≠©Ś≠ź" ka 2015 a cavilj pinakaleva tua pinapebulay a paridiu pakalevavan asikamasansivalj a " ka 2017 a cavilj pacunu uta Maysang Kalimud

duŇčh…ô i taitu tima…Ču, a ki ¶ua…≠aŇča a k…ômasi . masan tua ¶a ¶aquan a s…ômanaj kata *** nua ****kata****, sa **** kata pa ĒurugaŇč tima…Ču uta. papaqajam…ôn tima…Ču a s…ômanaŇča ta …≠iaw a s…ônaj S.FORM: Suming Rupi, 'inamiszukuan, pinualjak i 1978 a cavilj a sicigacu a tapuluq kata pitju a qadavan, a ngadan nua pairaing ti ŚßúŤĀĖśįĎ, mavananga a cacaquan a semanay kata śľĒŚď°. a amiszuku na donghe i taitu timadju, a kitjualanga a kemasi . masan tua cacaquan a semanay kata ŚźČšĽĖśČč nua ŚúĖť®įś®āŚúėkataŤČĺŚŹĮŤŹäśĖĮ, sa śľĒŚ•ŹÁõīÁ¨õ kata pa'urugang timadju uta. papaqayamen timadju a semananga ta liaw a senay sa sinansenay tua tjuruvu a cacaquan a semanay namadju. saka, macaqu a cempu, zemiya, zemuka timadju uta. sipakalevan ta kinasengseng na senay a "śąĎŚú®ťā£ťāäŚĒĪ" na sikamasansimuluq saka alu a ťáĎśõ≤ÁćéśúÄšĹ≥ś®āŚúė ka 2007 a cavilj timadju. sipakalevavan ta kinasengseng a "Ť∑≥ś†ľŚ≠ź" na Á¨¨45ŚĪÜ a ťáĎť¶¨ÁćéśúÄšĹ≥śĖįśľĒŚď°Áćé ka 2008 a cavilj timadju. sipakalevavan ta kinasengseng na senay a "SumingŤąíÁĪ≥śĀ©" na sikamasanitalj a ťáĎśõ≤ÁćéśúÄšĹ≥ś®āŚúė ka 2010 a cavilj timadju. semanuta timadju ta ťėŅÁĪ≥śĖĮťü≥ś®āÁĮÄ kata taqaljaqaljan nua Edoulan ka
